news.title:
Tube Investments acquires remaining 5.45% stake in TIVOLT for Rs. 30 crore.
The deal involved purchasing 3 crore equity shares to make TIVOLT wholly owned.
news.summary:
Tube Investments acquires remaining 5.45% stake in TIVOLT for Rs. 30 crore.
The deal involved purchasing 3 crore equity shares to make TIVOLT wholly owned.

news.title:
Murugappa Group's Vellayan Subbiah emphasizes free cash flow as key for manufacturing firms, driving strategic decisions and diversification.
Tube Investments and CG Power's growth stems from disciplined capital allocation; Group explores semiconductors post-COVID with govt. support.
news.summary:
Murugappa Group's Vellayan Subbiah emphasizes free cash flow as key for manufacturing firms, driving strategic decisions and diversification.
Tube Investments and CG Power's growth stems from disciplined capital allocation; Group explores semiconductors post-COVID with govt. support.

news.title:
Tube Investments to invest ₹250 Cr in Ti Clean Mobility via convertible shares.
The investment aims to enhance Tube Investments' electric mobility operations.
news.summary:
Tube Investments to invest ₹250 Cr in Ti Clean Mobility via convertible shares.
The investment aims to enhance Tube Investments' electric mobility operations.

news.title:
Tube Investments of India Ltd (TII) invests Rs. 250 Cr in subsidiary TI Clean Mobility Pvt Ltd via CCPS.
The funds will scale TICMPL's electric mobility operations; agreements include shareholder rights and conditions.
news.summary:
Tube Investments of India Ltd (TII) invests Rs. 250 Cr in subsidiary TI Clean Mobility Pvt Ltd via CCPS.

Murugappa Group stocks show divergence; Cholamandalam down 6%, Tube Investments, CG Power gain 2-2.5%.
Vellayan Subbiah to exit Cholamandalam, consolidates holdings in Tube Investments and CG Power.

news.title:
Tube Investments acquires 87% stake in Orange Koi for Rs. 73 Cr.
Deal expands Tube Investments into precision manufacturing sectors.
news.summary:
Tube Investments acquires 87% stake in Orange Koi for Rs. 73 Cr.

news.title:
Tube Investments declared a 200% dividend of 1.5/share, ex-date February 10, 2026.
The company shows mixed short-term returns but strong long-term positive performance.
news.summary:
Tube Investments declared a 200% dividend of 1.5/share, ex-date February 10, 2026.
The company shows mixed short-term returns but strong long-term positive performance.

news.title:
Tube Investments sees profits diverted to its loss-making EV arm, raising concerns over capital discipline and free cash flow.
Capital in EV business surged to Rs 1,908 cr in Q3 FY26; additional Rs 500-700 cr investment planned for FY27 amid high EBIT losses.
news.summary:
Tube Investments sees profits diverted to its loss-making EV arm, raising concerns over capital discipline and free cash flow.
Capital in EV business surged to Rs 1,908 cr in Q3 FY26; additional Rs 500-700 cr investment planned for FY27 amid high EBIT losses.

news.title:
Tube Investments fell 9.3% post-earnings call citing weak Europe demand, delayed railway business, and EV competition.
Standalone Q3 profit rose 17.6% to ₹189 crore, margins expanded to 14.3%, and interim dividend of ₹2 declared.
news.summary:
Tube Investments fell 9.3% post-earnings call citing weak Europe demand, delayed railway business, and EV competition.
Standalone Q3 profit rose 17.6% to ₹189 crore, margins expanded to 14.3%, and interim dividend of ₹2 declared.

news.title:
Murugappa Group's TII plans ₹500-750cr investment in EV subsidiary.
The move aims to scale operations and achieve break-even despite delays.
news.summary:
Murugappa Group's TII plans ₹500-750cr investment in EV subsidiary.
